TI.notes: strongly VIR-associated; likely personal names or occupational

NE.notes: cf. Hurrian plural -ne/-na; zero KI-RO similar to -JA

na_locative_test.interpretation: NOT compatible with locative (terminal use too high)

ja_intransitive_test.interpretation: STRONGLY COMPATIBLE with absolutive/intransitive: zero KI-RO, pre-logogram rate: 6.2%

te_dative_test.interpretation: See contextual analysis for dative compatibility

re_participle_test.interpretation: COMPATIBLE with active participle: highest accounting co-occurrence (19.0% KU-RO, 13.8% KI-RO)
